name: Forensic Disk Imaging Request
description: Manages the forensic disk imaging request workflow for incident response investigations. Riggs AI assesses the incident to determine if forensic imaging is warranted based on evidence requirements. If imaging is recommended, the workflow requires IR lead approval before dispatching the request. A Jira task is created with detailed imaging instructions, chain of custody requirements, and the target endpoint information. The forensics team is notified via Slack, and a delay node allows time for the imaging to complete before a follow-up verification check is logged.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create forensic imaging task with detailed instructions and chain of custody tracking

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify the forensics team about pending imaging requests

config.description: Triggers when a high or critical incident requires forensic disk imaging for evidence preservation

config.additional_instructions: Assess whether forensic disk imaging is necessary for this incident. Consider: malware persistence, rootkit indicators, data tampering evidence, and legal hold requirements. Recommend full disk image, memory dump, or targeted collection.
config.description: AI-powered assessment to determine if forensic imaging is warranted and what type of imaging is needed
Route based on whether the AI assessment recommends forensic disk imaging
IR lead must approve the forensic imaging request before it is dispatched to the forensics team
Create a detailed forensic imaging task in Jira with instructions and chain of custody template
Notify the forensics team via Slack about the approved imaging request
Wait 2 hours for the forensic imaging process to complete before follow-up

parameters.note: Forensic imaging requested for {{trigger_1.alert.hostname}} — Jira: {{respond_1.issue_key}}. Imaging window elapsed. Please verify completion status and hash verification in the Jira ticket.
